---
name: Enhancement
about: Propose an improvement, cleanup, or new capability.
title: "[Enhancement] "
labels: ["type:task"]
---

<!--
Keep this minimal.
Delete any optional section that does not matter.
Default label is type:task. If this turns out to be a real new capability rather than a task/refactor, switch it to type:feature during triage.
-->

## Summary

What should change?

## Rationale (Optional)

Why is this worth doing?

## Specification

<!--
这是提案的核心。请描述该功能在外部观察者的视角下是如何工作的。
不要描述内部代码逻辑，而是描述“契约”。
-->

### Acceptance Criteria

<!-- 请列出具体的、可测试的条件，满足这些条件即代表功能开发完成 -->

- [ ] Define the expected outcome clearly enough to verify.

## Technical Constraints (Optional)

<!--
为了实现上述 Specification，开发者在实现时必须遵守哪些硬性约束？如性能底线、安全/权限，依赖控制等
(注意：无需重复项目已有的常规架构模式、代码规范或隐性约定)
-->

Anything that must remain unchanged, any boundary that must be respected, or any implementation constraint.

## Backward Compatibility (Optional)

State `Not required` if backward compatibility does not matter.

## Alternatives Considered (Optional)

What options were considered and why were they rejected?

## References (Optional)

Links to TODO items, task notes, prior discussions, PRs, code, docs, or screenshots.
